name: French Toast
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg whites in a bowl until frothy.
2. Add the soy milk, cinnamon, and vanilla extract to the beaten eggs and stir until well combined.
3. If using tofu instead of eggs, puree 4 oz of firm tofu with the soy milk in a blender until smooth. Stir in the cinnamon and vanilla extract and any additional liquid needed to thin the batter. Mix well.
4. Lightly spray a non-stick pan with PAM cooking spray and place over medium heat.
5. Dip each piece of bread into the egg white mixture, coating both sides evenly.
6. Place the coated bread onto the hot pan and cook until golden brown on each side, about 2-3 minutes per side.
7. Remove from heat and serve immediately.
These French Toast were quite good and a tasty addition to breakfast after reading the article.
